triviaEntries.text: Eunice was working at McDonald's before entering the Gladiators show.
She performs regularly as Angelina Jolie's stunt-double.

While working as a stunt double on The Beach in the scene when Richard Françoise and Étienne reach the large waterfall Eunice was the stunt double to take over for Françoise who then runs of the cliff edge and into the waterfall below. If Eunice had not ran fast enough and jump out far enough she would have hit the rocks below just under the water and been injured or killed.
Eunice is godmother to Angelina Jolie and Brad Pitt's eldest child Shiloh Jolie-Pitt.
